name: superhelpers
description: Bundle of reusable, project-agnostic Claude Code workflow skills. Currently bundles: finishing-the-session (end-of-session wrap-up — deterministic gate verification with evidence, requirement traceability, independent fresh-context review, a complete next-session handoff, then a clean commit). Project-agnostic — each skill reads gate commands, response language, and handoff paths from the project's CLAUDE.md.
